name: Fresh Vegetable Turkey Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Seven Seas Viva (or any Brand) Italian Dressing
1 cup Sliced zucchini or yellow Squash
1/2 lb Lois Rich fully cooked Oven Roasted Breast of Turkey, cut into strips
2 oz Kraft Natural Shredded Mild Cheddar Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour dressing over tomatoes, mushrooms, zucchini, olives, red pepper, carrot, and onions.
2. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours to marinate.
3. Toss the vegetable mixture with greens.
4. Top with turkey and cheese.
5. Serve with additional dressing if desired.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
Variation: Substitute Seven Seas Free Italian or Light Italian Reduced Calorie Dressing for Seven Seas Viva Italian Dressing. Preparation time: 15 minutes plus refrigerating.
